task: RDT-D Part 3 data leg — SAFE/IMF SDDS Reserves Data Template ingestion (Section I.A instrument split)
publisher: State Administration of Foreign Exchange (SAFE), English channel safe.gov.cn/en (ForexReserves + DataTemplateonInternational)
channel_note: All 132 monthly files obtained from the SAFE English channel; the Chinese channel was NOT needed (no missing months).

coverage.note: 2015-06..2017-12 via 31 monthly article pages under /en/DataTemplateonInternational/; 2018..2026 via direct .xls links on yearly pages. Data month read from the file header (As-at date), never from link labels.

units: Template values in 亿美元 (100 million USD); CSV converted to USD bn (/10). A parallel SDR column exists from 2016-04 (publisher note in files); not used.

populated_all_132_months: (1)(b)(i) with other national central banks, BIS and IMF
(1)(b)(ii) with banks headquartered in the reporting country
(1)(b)(iii) with banks headquartered outside the reporting country

blank_or_zero_lines.line: (1)(a) of which: issuer headquartered in reporting country but located abroad
blank_or_zero_lines.finding: never carries a nonzero value; blank is a disclosure state, not interpolated

blank_or_zero_lines.line: (1)(b)(iii) of which: located in the reporting country

structural_findings: The (ii) of-which sub-line ('located abroad') EQUALS the full (ii) line in all 132 months (max diff 0): every deposit with Chinese-HQ banks is booked at their offices abroad.

The (5) financial-derivatives sub-line equals the whole 'Other reserve assets' line in all 132 months (goes negative, e.g. -0.491 bn 2020-10): 'other reserve assets' is entirely financial derivatives.

Deposits are a tiny share of the FX-reserves line throughout: 0.08% (2022-03) to 1.36% (2025-02) — the securities line carries essentially the whole FX-reserves line. [Range restated 2026-07-02 with the 2020-10 row correction noted under publisher_frictions; the superseded raw_074 row had implied a 0.06% minimum at 2020-10.]

No suppression of the required Part-3 lines anywhere in 2015-06..2026-05: securities, all three deposit counterpart lines, and other reserve assets are populated in every month. The OTHER-OR-SUPPRESSED axis, if it triggers, cannot trigger on suppression of these lines.
publisher_frictions: 2020-10 was published twice: file dated 2020-11-30 (deposits with banks HQ outside reporting country = -0.589 bn, a negative deposit line; securities 3126.162 bn, deposits total 1.820 bn) and a corrected file dated 2020-12-31 (securities 3124.692 bn, deposits total 3.290 bn, (iii) = +0.881 bn). Both retained (raw_074_*, raw_075_*); the later-published file is used in the CSV; totals/fx/gold identical across the two.

CORRECTION (2026-07-02, RDT-D gate): the CSV 2020-10 row initially carried the superseded raw_074 vintage, contradicting the stated policy above; the row was rebuilt by re-parsing raw_075 (securities 3124.69182, dep (i) 1.470163, (ii) 0.939457, (iii) 0.88056 bn; other/IMF/SDR/gold/total identical across vintages). 2020-10 is off the verdict axis: no axis delta and no verdict input changed.
2015-06..2016-03 files carry a single USD column (the SDR column was added from April 2016 per the note inside the files).
Numeric precision varies by vintage: some files carry full float precision, most are rounded to 0.01 亿 (0.001 bn).
One transient fetch failure (2023-12 file, HTTP 000/timeout) succeeded on immediate retry; logged.

reconciliation.verdict: Template total official reserve assets vs committed rdtc_safe_totals monthly totals: max |diff| = 0.000 bn over all 54 overlap months (2021-12..2026-05) on every shared line — same publisher, exact match.

context_deltas_NOT_verdict.axis: 2023-05 -> 2026-04 (RDT-B/C verdict axis; SDDS fully covers it — latest template month 2026-05)
context_deltas_NOT_verdict.note: Descriptive context only; RDT-D verdicts (netting rule, thresholds) are computed by the fragility leg per RDTD_prediction.md. Deposits-total delta over the axis = +12.248 bn; securities delta = +221.791 bn; their sum reproduces the committed ΔFX(ex-gold) +234.039 bn to 0.000.

files.duplicate_note: raw_074/raw_075 = the two 2020-10 vintages; sample_202605.xls = an early manual fetch of the same URL as raw_004 (identical values).
